transcript.clean_text: welcome back to gcn and eurosport for highlights of the penultimate day of the dured italia stage 20 the final big mountain showdown flat from the start in virbania and through into switzerland but after around 80 kilometers the fun would start for us and the pain for the riders the passo san bernardino 24 kms long and the first of two climbs to crested over 2000 meters above sea level the second of those was the splugan pass after which they'd face a long descent down to the climb that would take them to the finish the alpine motti 4 200 meters of climbing over 164 k's nine riders would make it up the road after they'd gone into switzerland but by the time they climbed towards the top of the bernardino they were down to just five and their gap at just 90 seconds groshartner visconti vivaca palo and albanese probably already resigned to their fate albanese took maximum points but it was geoffrey bouchard in the kom jersey who swept up the remaining ones team dsm though clearly had a plan they flew down the descent separating themselves from what remained of the peloton and soon caught the break and they would soon have welcome company pillow bilbao bringing damiana caruso across ineos grenadiers had reason to be worried their gap wasn't huge but it began to grow over half a minute as they tackled the second climb of the day and that continued to rise as the road did too with stora and bilbao there to do the work barde and caruso could afford to sit in the wheels bernal though was once again riding with maturity putting full confidence in his team despite the fact they were down to just castrovieco and martinez as they descended towards the final climb up front with stora and then bilbao done for the day it was up to carruzzo to press on in search of time and a stage win bardet content to sit on he was only thinking of the latter their problem was that daniel martinez was on fire such was the pace of the colombian from the ineos grenadiers that the rides in that group were popping one after another at the head of the race spa day had gone pop two carruzzo has been man of the match at this race few of us expected him to go on the offensive today but given how good his legs have been maybe we shouldn't have been surprised even simon yates was in difficulty due to the pace of martinez inside the last two k's to go and it was just burned now and al maida on his wheel could that man though hold on for deserved stage victory well the gap was coming down but with 1k to go he still held on to 21 seconds of an advantage al made it already distanced by that point and we had our answer in the end damiana carruzzo deserved my friend that was a fantastic stage victory for the italian from the bahrain victorious team it would be 24 seconds before bernal crossed the line in second on the day a job well done by him and his team it's not over yet but he's almost assured of the overall victory martinez hung on for third on the day almeida so near and yet so far for the third consecutive mountain stage he'd take fourth yates would roll across the line in fifth but what about carruzzo a man who's dedicated his entire career to working for others a man who's never won a stage of a grand tour never won a world tour race writing himself into the jude italia history books chapeau there's been no change in the top four riders on the general classification leno's grip on the pink jersey isn't quite as strong as it was but he still holds on to almost two minutes over carruzo hugh carthy was the big loser on the day dropping two places to seventh allowing bardet and martinez to move up one place to fifth and sixth respectively and so one stage to go a 30k individual time trial flatters a pancake starting in synagogue and taking an urban run through the streets of milan to the finish line next to the duomo there are a few twists and turns along the way but not a hill in sight which many riders will be very pleased about the gc looks settled but it's not over until it's over and of course there's still a stage win up for grabs will it be ghana will it be affini we'll have to wait and see for now it's terrar territory restrictions apply but if you can join us for the 21st and final stage of the jira italia on gcn plus tomorrow you
